title: What to Say in a Shop
description: Useful Bulgarian words and phrases for shopping, asking prices, and speaking to staff.

content.title: Shop Vocabulary
content.description: Start with the basic nouns you need in stores and markets.

content.title: Key Phrases
content.description: These phrases help you ask for help and make simple purchases.

content.note: One of the most important shopping questions.
Very useful in a clothing shop.
A natural phrase at the cashier.

content.title: Useful Extras
content.description: Small phrases that make shopping smoother.

content.title: Shopping habits
bullets: Use polite phrases when asking for help.
Ask about size, color, or price if needed.

content.title: Market tip
content.text: In markets and small shops, a friendly greeting and a clear price question are often enough to start the conversation.

content.title: Practice
content.description: A quick check on the most useful shopping phrase.

content.question: How do you ask 'How much does this cost?'
